issues.description: Missing first effect entirely. DSL only contains [On Play] effect but card text describes two separate effects: (1) [Opponent's Turn] triggered effect with condition on Leader type, and (2) [On Play] effect. First effect should trigger when opponent plays a Character, check Leader type condition, and rest up to 1 opponent Character, then rest this Character.
Incomplete [On Play] effect. Should rest up to 1 opponent Character with cost 4 or less, but also should rest THIS character after the first effect resolves.
